title: Dimension Collection
description: A Records collection whose items are dimension members. Extends OGC API - Records collection with a provider object (full configuration) and a cube:dimensions property (slim reference for STAC clients).

itemType.description: Item type is always 'record' for dimension collections.

extent.description: Temporal or value extent of the dimension.

provider.description: Full provider definition for this dimension — config, parameters, output schema, invertible flag, hierarchy structure, language support. This is the authoritative provider description; the slim reference in cube:dimensions.*.provider points here.

conformsTo.description: OGC conformance classes supported by this dimension collection (e.g. dimension-inverse, dimension-hierarchical).

cube:dimensions.description: Datacube dimension definitions (STAC Datacube Extension + ogc-dimensions extensions). Contains slim provider references — follow provider.href for full details.
